scene.message: Brown: Huh~? What's gotten{nl} into Ms. Saeko, anyway?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: To think even Ms. Saeko{nl} is acting strange...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Ugh~ It's all gloomy{nl} and damp in here.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Our Ms. Saeko is the{nl} prettier one, right?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Oh, Ms. Natsumi!{waitkey}{ret}
Ms. Saeko: ............{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Ms. Saeko, it feels{nl} like it's been quite a while.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Ngh{wait_fr:48}{nl} so gloomy...!!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Ngh{wait_fr:48}{nl} so gloomy...!!{waitkey}{ret}
Agastya Tree: Young one...{nl} You have come before me.{waitkey}{ret}
Agastya Tree: Young one...{nl} Go forth with care.{waitkey}{ret}
